title: Moobloom (With Data-Driven Variants)
description: a mod that adds mooblooms to the game
body:
Welcome to Mooblooms mod for NeoForge & Forge,
This mod adds 16 variants of Moobloom to the game but as of V2 for 1,21.4 you can add your own variants with datapacks and resource packs! (Example Pack Download)
 
The Variants we add within the base mod are Allium, Azure Bluet, Blue Orchid, Closed Eyeblossom, Cornflower, dandelion, Lily of the Valley, Open Eyeblossom, Orange Tulip, Oxeye Daisy, Pink Tulip, Poppy, Red Tulip, Torchflower, White Tulip, Wither Rose, Cactus Flower (1.21.5)
 
The Mooblooms can spawn within Flower Forests, Meadows or Sunflower Plains but you can adjust this within the data driven variants datapack if you want to add more biomes or removes possible biomes
 
Whats possible with custom variants!
With adding your own variants there are plenty of options you can adjust,
The first few being the biome the mob appears in, the loot table the mob drops when it has been sheared, the block that renders on the mobs back and the texture of the custom variant (we provide about 16 free textures for you to use (one for each mc colour))
 

Next we have added some new options like can you click bonemeal on this variant to produce more of the flowers on its back, also the cooldown between clicking bonemeal on the variant and finally can this variant place its flower type random within the world
All these options can be adjust per variant and you can also adjust these values within the variants we have made just by renaming the json file as the flower type you want to adjust 

All Custom Options:![options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f5ed7d5f4ed423e2e82277b2aef34f66d1ca8c3.png)
